summary: A CRITICAL incident on the U66@DOM1 account. From pivot host C17693, the account authenticated to 129 hosts, reaching the critical asset C2388. 209 anomaly alerts were correlated from 215 events into this single incident.

attributed_actor.justification: Ember Bear matches 2/2 observed techniques (profile coverage 100%; semantic similarity 0.66).

response_actions.action: Isolate the pivot host, block SMB/NTLM between segments
Isolate choke-point host C17693 (cuts blast radius of 129 hosts)
Open incident ticket INC-PS7-LANL-001 + notify SOC lead

mttd.citation: Mandiant M-Trends 2024 - global median dwell ~10 days
mttd.note: time to first correlated alert in this log (measured); industry dwell is a cited comparison, not our claim
